task_completion.description: Verify the report includes the correct Java version, JAVA_HOME path, and Gradle wrapper version.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor displaying the report shows Java version 17 (or OpenJDK 17.0.x), a JAVA_HOME path, and Gradle version 7.6.

task_completion.description: Verify the report identifies the correct DDS implementation name found in the source tree.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor displaying the report explicitly mentions 'RTI Connext' or 'RTI DDS' (and optionally version 7.3.0) as the DDS implementation.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes the build status of the demo-apps module based on the presence of artifacts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor displaying the report contains a YES or NO build status for the demo-apps module, referencing the /opt/openice/mdpnp/interop-lab/demo-apps/build/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OpenICE GUI to create a simulated device adapter and launch a clinical application, and recorded their names in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenICE Supervisor GUI open with a simulated device and clinical app running. The text report includes the specific names of the simulated device adapter and clinical application that were launched.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes the full path to the active OpenICE log file and its activity status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor displaying the report shows the log file path '/home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log' and an activity status of YES or NO.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes an overall PASS/FAIL determination and is saved to the correct desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report contains a clear 'PASS' or 'FAIL' determination. The text editor's title bar or a terminal window confirms the file is saved exactly at '/home/ga/Desktop/platform_readiness_report.txt'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the OpenICE Supervisor GUI to launch devices and apps, rather than just guessing names.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the OpenICE Supervisor application window actively open and being interacted with (e.g., clicking on device simulators or clinical apps).

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely explored the system to find the required information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal windows showing commands like 'java -version', 'cat gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties', 'ls /opt/openice/mdpnp/interop-lab/demo-apps/build/', or searches for DDS implementations.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually or programmatically constructed the report based on findings, rather than copying a pre-existing template without verification.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should look like it was written by the agent (e.g., open in a text editor like gedit or nano) and contains specific system details matching the terminal outputs seen in earlier screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct report path is /home/ga/Desktop/platform_readiness_report.txt. The expected Java version is 17 (OpenJDK 17.0.x). The expected Gradle version is 7.6. The expected DDS implementation is RTI Connext (or RTI DDS, version 7.3.0). The build artifacts are located in /opt/openice/mdpnp/interop-lab/demo-apps/build/. The correct log file location is /home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log.
